posts.text: Trump’s war spirals after U.S.-Israeli strikes on gas fields his admin first backed… then denied. Allies rebuke him, officials get grilled. Plus new Epstein fallout, which we will never stop covering. Watch the MeidasTouch Podcast at 8p ET/5p PT. piped.video/live/iZo_-wL5fT8…
RT @GuidoCrosetto: Ho letto interpretazioni totalmente errate sul documento approvato oggi da alcune nazioni europee e non, tra cui l’Itali…

He wanted them to help before the war he didn’t tell anybody about had even started.


Acyn (@Acyn)

Trump: NATO doesn’t want to help us defend the strait and they're the ones that need it. But now they're getting much nicer because they're seeing my attitude. But it's as far as I'm concerned, it's too late. UK wants to send aircraft carriers now. And I said, I want the aircraft carriers before the war. I don't want them after the war is won. There's practically nobody to shoot at them.

Video

Yikes


Acyn (@Acyn)

Reporter: Why didn't you tell allies about the war before attacking Iran?

Trump: We wanted it to be a surprise. Who knows better about surprise than Japan? Why didn't you tell me about Pearl Harbor?

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/Acyn/status/2034665671037202476#m

🚨TOP Trump Officials THROW HIM UNDER BUS at WAR HEARING!!

Trump’s war spirals after U.S.-Israeli strikes on gas fields his admin first backed… then denied. Allies rebuke him, officials get grilled. Plus new Epstein fallout, which we will never stop covering. Watch the MeidasTouch Podcast at 8p ET/5p PT.
Hegseth: The world, the Middle East, our ungrateful allies in Europe, even segments of our own press should be saying one thing to President Trump: Thank you.

Reporter: Why didn't you tell allies about the war before attacking Iran?

Trump: We wanted it to be a surprise. Who knows better about surprise than Japan? Why didn't you tell me about Pearl Harbor?
This is so awesome. I have a new favorite clip…

Trump just threw Israel under the bus—claiming the U.S. “knew nothing” about the strike on Iran’s South Pars gas field—despite earlier Axios reporting it was coordinated with and approved by his own administration.

Rand Paul: I don't think that kind of person sends the right message to ICE agents.. I don't know how we get that from a guy who says he'll jump over the dais, and people deserve to be punched in the mouth and caning and dueling is a good example for the modern congress.

AOC: I think we know without a doubt that this is a war of choice—that Donald Trump has initiated all of these hostilities, killing American service members and innocent Iranians alike, and for no reason. He has a different reason every day.

AOC: We rely on hundreds of thousands of home care workers across the country. This labor force is going to expand a lot as more of our parents reach older age, and these folks need to be paid a fair wage.

These are some of the most exploited workers in the country.

AOC on Defiance Act: This is one of those circumstances where we need to nudge it along. We need to say, ‘Hey, listen, there are some circumstances where we can put aside our differences, and we’ll celebrate anyone and everyone who helps get this past the finish line.’

GARCIA: It was clear from the minute it started that the attorney general is trying to evade the subpoena. We asked her that question. Multiple members asked. She would not respond. She said she'll continue to follow the law. That is not a response

LEE: I asked Chairman Comer, if Pam Bondi did not come, would he force her to or if he would move for contempt hearings as he did for other people who did not respond to our subpoena? Instead of answering as an adult, he said that I was “bitching”

PabloReports: Do the Epstein files make Trump a target for blackmail?

AOC: If a foreign actor has more access to the Epstein files than Congress, I would suspect the odds of blackmail being possible could be quite high.
NEW: Families requested no cameras at today's dignified transfer at Dover, yet Trump’s White House released and promoted photos from the ceremony across social media, including TikTok.
Link to the redacted version on the DOJ website: www.justice.gov/epstein/file...

The notes reference Trump being on Epstein’s plane, contradicting public denials.

It confirms Trump had interactions connected to Epstein’s world, far beyond what he has repeatedly claimed. Trump: "I may have been [at Epstein's house] with my wife" 3/

Here’s what stands out:

Trump’s own attorney set the record straight on whether Epstein was ever expelled from Mar-a-Lago. He admitted: "No [Epstein] was not a member. May have been a guest. Never asked to leave."

Mar-a-Lago's manager also confirmed that Epstein was never asked to leave. 2/

WOW: DOJ redactions hid key details about Trump’s Epstein ties — and Rep. Dan Goldman just revealed what they were trying to cover up.

In the unredacted document shown today by Goldman, we can now read the full notes from a 2009 conversation involving Jeffrey Epstein and Trump’s attorneys. 1/
Big news from Karoline Leavitt: 100% of Trump supporters support Trump
